title: Iran Moves to Formalize Toll Plan in Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Tehran has effectively closed off the critical waterway, turning back container ships on Friday, and Iranian lawmakers are considering whether to formalize charging fees to pass.
summary_public: Tehran has effectively closed off the critical waterway, turning back container ships on Friday, and Iranian lawmakers are considering whether to formalize charging fees to pass.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran Moves to Formalize Toll Plan in Strait of Hormuz
